title: Frog logo pack
description: turns the logo into a frog
body:
this is a simple pack that changes the minecraft logo (only main menu) to an image of a frog![the Minecraft logo fully replaced with an image of a frog ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94a141ead1c8110bc81ae8d61613397271d9cc23.png)
this is a small pack i made for myself and i thought it would be fun to upload it

(also it doesn't modify the version in the realms menu)

alternate link: {planet minecraft link goes here once approved on that site}
